# Differentiate SwiGLU and quantize token gradients

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This quantization translation derives scaling factors and converted values without scalar tensor loops.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/quant/swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/quant/swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
void swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast(
    QuantDType *x, float *x_sf, __bf16 *grad_out, __bf16 *out,
    QuantDType *x_grad_fp8, float *x_grad_fp8_sf, __bf16 *x_grad,
    float max_val, float clamp_min) {
    static_assert(NumPerChannels == 32 || NumPerChannels == 128,
                  "source supports 32 or 128 channels per scale");
    static_assert(TileH % NumPerChannels == 0,
                  "tile must contain whole per-token scale groups");
    static_assert(TileH * static_cast<int>(sizeof(float)) >= 128,
                  "thread-local fp32 fragment must be at least 128 bytes");
    constexpr int kTK = Hidden / TileH;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_x = global_tensor<QuantDType, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden * 2>>;
    using gm_xsf = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens,
                                                Hidden * 2 / NumPerChannels>>;
    using gm_go = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden>>;
    using gm_o = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden>>;
    using gm_gq = global_tensor<QuantDType, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden * 2>>;
    using gm_gsf = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens,
                                                Hidden * 2 / NumPerChannels>>;
    using gm_g = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden * 2>>;
    using tile_q = LocalTile< QuantDType, 1, TileH, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_b = LocalTile< __bf16, 1, TileH, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_f = LocalTile< float, 1, TileH, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_sf = LocalTile< float, 1, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, 1>;
    using it_x = global_iterator<gm_x, tile_q>;
    using it_xsf = global_iterator<gm_xsf, tile_sf>;
    using it_go = global_iterator<gm_go, tile_b>;
    using it_o = global_iterator<gm_o, tile_b>;
    using it_gq = global_iterator<gm_gq, tile_q>;
    using it_gsf = global_iterator<gm_gsf, tile_sf>;
    using it_g = global_iterator<gm_g, tile_b>;
    it_x x_iter(x);
    it_xsf xsf_iter(x_sf);
    it_go go_iter(grad_out);
    it_o o_iter(out);
    it_gq gq_iter(x_grad_fp8);
    it_gsf gsf_iter(x_grad_fp8_sf);
    it_g g_iter(x_grad);

    for (int t = 0; t < NumExpandTokens; ++t) {
        for (int tk = 0; tk < kTK; ++tk) {
            auto gx0 = x_iter(t, tk);
            auto gx1 = x_iter(t, kTK + tk);
            auto gs0 = xsf_iter(t, tk);
            auto gs1 = xsf_iter(t, kTK + tk);
            auto ggo = go_iter(t, tk);
            auto gout = o_iter(t, tk);
            auto gg0 = g_iter(t, tk);
            auto gg1 = g_iter(t, kTK + tk);
            auto ggq0 = gq_iter(t, tk);
            auto ggq1 = gq_iter(t, kTK + tk);
            auto ggs0 = gsf_iter(t, tk);
            auto ggs1 = gsf_iter(t, kTK + tk);
            tile_q xq, yq, xgq, ygq;
            tile_b gob, outb, xgb, ygb;
            tile_f xf, yf, xsf_full, ysf_full, gof, neg_x, expn, denom, sig,
                silu, act, x_grad_f, y_grad_f, neg_xg, neg_yg, x_scaled,
                y_scaled, x_inv_full, y_inv_full;
            tile_sf xsf, ysf, xpos, xneg, xamax, ysgn, ypos, yneg, yamax,
                xsfo, ysfo, xinv, yinv;
            TLOAD(xq, gx0);
            TLOAD(yq, gx1);
            TLOAD(xsf, gs0);
            TLOAD(ysf, gs1);
            TLOAD(gob, ggo);
            TCVT(xf, xq);
            TCVT(yf, yq);
            TCVT(gof, gob);
            TROWEXPAND(xsf_full, xsf);
            TROWEXPAND(ysf_full, ysf);
            TMUL(xf, xf, xsf_full);
            TMUL(yf, yf, ysf_full);
            TMULS(neg_x, xf, -1.0f);
            TEXP(expn, neg_x);
            TADDS(denom, expn, 1.0f);
            TRECIP(sig, denom);
            TMUL(silu, xf, sig);
            TMUL(act, silu, yf);
            TCVT(outb, act);
            TMUL(x_grad_f, gof, sig);
            TMUL(x_grad_f, x_grad_f, yf);
            TMUL(y_grad_f, gof, silu);
            TCVT(xgb, x_grad_f);
            TCVT(ygb, y_grad_f);
            TMULS(neg_xg, x_grad_f, -1.0f);
            TROWMAX(xpos, x_grad_f);
            TROWMAX(xneg, neg_xg);
            TMAX(xamax, xpos, xneg);
            TMAXS(xamax, xamax, clamp_min);
            TMULS(xsfo, xamax, 1.0f / max_val);
            TRECIP(xinv, xamax);
            TMULS(xinv, xinv, max_val);
            TROWEXPAND(x_inv_full, xinv);
            TMUL(x_scaled, x_grad_f, x_inv_full);
            TMULS(neg_yg, y_grad_f, -1.0f);
            TROWMAX(ypos, y_grad_f);
            TROWMAX(yneg, neg_yg);
            TMAX(yamax, ypos, yneg);
            TMAXS(yamax, yamax, clamp_min);
            TMULS(ysfo, yamax, 1.0f / max_val);
            TRECIP(yinv, yamax);
            TMULS(yinv, yinv, max_val);
            TROWEXPAND(y_inv_full, yinv);
            TMUL(y_scaled, y_grad_f, y_inv_full);
            TCVT(xgq, x_scaled);
            TCVT(ygq, y_scaled);
            TSTORE(gout, outb);
            TSTORE(gg0, xgb);
            TSTORE(gg1, ygb);
            TSTORE(ggs0, xsfo);
            TSTORE(ggs1, ysfo);
            TSTORE(ggq0, xgq);
            TSTORE(ggq1, ygq);
        }
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load an activation fragment, compute an absolute maximum with tile reductions, derive the scale, convert the valid values, and store data and scale tiles.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TADDS`](../../../intrinsics/tadds.md), [`TCVT`](../../../intrinsics/tcvt.md), [`TEXP`](../../../intrinsics/texp.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMAX`](../../../intrinsics/tmax.md), [`TMAXS`](../../../intrinsics/tmaxs.md), [`TMUL`](../../../intrinsics/tmul.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TRECIP`](../../../intrinsics/trecip.md), [`TROWEXPAND`](../../../intrinsics/trowexpand.md), [`TROWMAX`](../../../intrinsics/trowmax.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition outer rows; threads own non-overlapping token, channel, or block fragments whose valid payload is at least 128 bytes.

## Memory and tile flow

Activation tiles are converted to the accumulation type, reduced for scale calculation, transformed, converted to the output type, and stored with their scale tiles.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

??? code "swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast_pto.hpp"

    ```cpp title="swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_SWIGLU_BACKWARD_AND_PER_TOKEN_CAST_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_SWIGLU_BACKWARD_AND_PER_TOKEN_CAST_PTO_HPP

    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <typename QuantDType, int NumExpandTokens, int Hidden,
              int NumPerChannels = 128, int TileH = 128>
    void swiglu_backward_and_per_token_cast(
        QuantDType *x, float *x_sf, __bf16 *grad_out, __bf16 *out,
        QuantDType *x_grad_fp8, float *x_grad_fp8_sf, __bf16 *x_grad,
        float max_val, float clamp_min) {
        static_assert(NumPerChannels == 32 || NumPerChannels == 128,
                      "source supports 32 or 128 channels per scale");
        static_assert(TileH % NumPerChannels == 0,
                      "tile must contain whole per-token scale groups");
        static_assert(TileH * static_cast<int>(sizeof(float)) >= 128,
                      "thread-local fp32 fragment must be at least 128 bytes");
        constexpr int kTK = Hidden / TileH;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_x = global_tensor<QuantDType, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden * 2>>;
        using gm_xsf = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens,
                                                    Hidden * 2 / NumPerChannels>>;
        using gm_go = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden>>;
        using gm_o = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden>>;
        using gm_gq = global_tensor<QuantDType, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden * 2>>;
        using gm_gsf = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens,
                                                    Hidden * 2 / NumPerChannels>>;
        using gm_g = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<NumExpandTokens, Hidden * 2>>;
        using tile_q = LocalTile< QuantDType, 1, TileH, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_b = LocalTile< __bf16, 1, TileH, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_f = LocalTile< float, 1, TileH, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_sf = LocalTile< float, 1, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, 1>;
        using it_x = global_iterator<gm_x, tile_q>;
        using it_xsf = global_iterator<gm_xsf, tile_sf>;
        using it_go = global_iterator<gm_go, tile_b>;
        using it_o = global_iterator<gm_o, tile_b>;
        using it_gq = global_iterator<gm_gq, tile_q>;
        using it_gsf = global_iterator<gm_gsf, tile_sf>;
        using it_g = global_iterator<gm_g, tile_b>;
        it_x x_iter(x);
        it_xsf xsf_iter(x_sf);
        it_go go_iter(grad_out);
        it_o o_iter(out);
        it_gq gq_iter(x_grad_fp8);
        it_gsf gsf_iter(x_grad_fp8_sf);
        it_g g_iter(x_grad);

        for (int t = 0; t < NumExpandTokens; ++t) {
            for (int tk = 0; tk < kTK; ++tk) {
                auto gx0 = x_iter(t, tk);
                auto gx1 = x_iter(t, kTK + tk);
                auto gs0 = xsf_iter(t, tk);
                auto gs1 = xsf_iter(t, kTK + tk);
                auto ggo = go_iter(t, tk);
                auto gout = o_iter(t, tk);
                auto gg0 = g_iter(t, tk);
                auto gg1 = g_iter(t, kTK + tk);
                auto ggq0 = gq_iter(t, tk);
                auto ggq1 = gq_iter(t, kTK + tk);
                auto ggs0 = gsf_iter(t, tk);
                auto ggs1 = gsf_iter(t, kTK + tk);
                tile_q xq, yq, xgq, ygq;
                tile_b gob, outb, xgb, ygb;
                tile_f xf, yf, xsf_full, ysf_full, gof, neg_x, expn, denom, sig,
                    silu, act, x_grad_f, y_grad_f, neg_xg, neg_yg, x_scaled,
                    y_scaled, x_inv_full, y_inv_full;
                tile_sf xsf, ysf, xpos, xneg, xamax, ysgn, ypos, yneg, yamax,
                    xsfo, ysfo, xinv, yinv;
                TLOAD(xq, gx0);
                TLOAD(yq, gx1);
                TLOAD(xsf, gs0);
                TLOAD(ysf, gs1);
                TLOAD(gob, ggo);
                TCVT(xf, xq);
                TCVT(yf, yq);
                TCVT(gof, gob);
                TROWEXPAND(xsf_full, xsf);
                TROWEXPAND(ysf_full, ysf);
                TMUL(xf, xf, xsf_full);
                TMUL(yf, yf, ysf_full);
                TMULS(neg_x, xf, -1.0f);
                TEXP(expn, neg_x);
                TADDS(denom, expn, 1.0f);
                TRECIP(sig, denom);
                TMUL(silu, xf, sig);
                TMUL(act, silu, yf);
                TCVT(outb, act);
                TMUL(x_grad_f, gof, sig);
                TMUL(x_grad_f, x_grad_f, yf);
                TMUL(y_grad_f, gof, silu);
                TCVT(xgb, x_grad_f);
                TCVT(ygb, y_grad_f);
                TMULS(neg_xg, x_grad_f, -1.0f);
                TROWMAX(xpos, x_grad_f);
                TROWMAX(xneg, neg_xg);
                TMAX(xamax, xpos, xneg);
                TMAXS(xamax, xamax, clamp_min);
                TMULS(xsfo, xamax, 1.0f / max_val);
                TRECIP(xinv, xamax);
                TMULS(xinv, xinv, max_val);
                TROWEXPAND(x_inv_full, xinv);
                TMUL(x_scaled, x_grad_f, x_inv_full);
                TMULS(neg_yg, y_grad_f, -1.0f);
                TROWMAX(ypos, y_grad_f);
                TROWMAX(yneg, neg_yg);
                TMAX(yamax, ypos, yneg);
                TMAXS(yamax, yamax, clamp_min);
                TMULS(ysfo, yamax, 1.0f / max_val);
                TRECIP(yinv, yamax);
                TMULS(yinv, yinv, max_val);
                TROWEXPAND(y_inv_full, yinv);
                TMUL(y_scaled, y_grad_f, y_inv_full);
                TCVT(xgq, x_scaled);
                TCVT(ygq, y_scaled);
                TSTORE(gout, outb);
                TSTORE(gg0, xgb);
                TSTORE(gg1, ygb);
                TSTORE(ggs0, xsfo);
                TSTORE(ggs1, ysfo);
                TSTORE(ggq0, xgq);
                TSTORE(ggq1, ygq);
            }
        }
    }

    }

    #endif
    ```
